params_used.custom_text: // This module operates on the positive edge of the clock signal (CLK_P) and includes an active-high reset (RESET_A). It takes a single data input (D) and two control signals (ctrl_x, ctrl_y) to determine its output (Q). Depending on the combination of control signals, the output can be set to either a logic HIGH, the negation of D, the value of D, or a logic LOW. This design effectively functions as a controlled latch or flip-flop, allowing for different operations based on the control inputs while ensuring reset functionality.
